---
subtitle: Mandatory assignment 1
---

```{r}
#| echo: false
#| message: false
#| warning: false

library(purrr)
library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(stringr)
library(forcats)
library(arrow)

results <- arrow::read_parquet("../submissions/ma-1-evaluation_results.parquet")
# Visualization
# Replace separate category_map / category_order / category_colors with one metadata table
criteria_meta <- tibble(
  criterion = c(
    "style_guide_followed",
    "pipe_used_consistently",
    "no_dead_code",
    "dry_principle_followed",
    "meaningful_variable_names",
    "no_magic_numbers",
    "consistent_naming_convention",
    "logical_code_organization",
    "no_debug_output",
    "no_absolute_paths",
    "no_setwd_calls",
    "packages_loaded_at_top",
    "no_unused_packages",
    "seed_set_explicitly",
    "seed_set_appropriately",
    "no_implicit_workspace",
    "chunks_execute_in_order",
    "figures_have_captions",
    "axes_are_labeled",
    "tables_properly_formatted",
    "tables_have_captions",
    "numeric_columns_formatted",
    "prose_explains_choices",
    "findings_discussed",
    "logical_section_structure",
    "cross_references_used",
    "data_loaded_once",
    "vectorized_operations",
    "no_spelling_errors",
    "no_grammatical_errors",
    "no_punctuation_errors",
    "consistent_tense",
    "no_informal_language",
    "claims_are_cited",
    "citations_formatted_consistently",
    "references_section_present",
    "references_complete",
    "no_uncited_references",
    "doi_or_url_provided",
    "no_undefined_acronyms",
    "no_undefined_notation",
    "sentences_are_concise",
    "no_redundant_phrases",
    "precise_quantitative_language",
    "headings_are_informative",
    "consistent_formatting",
    "numbers_formatted_in_prose",
    "no_ai_filler_phrases",
    "no_overclaiming",
    "no_list_overuse",
    "no_padding",
    "voice_is_consistent",
    "numbers_consistent",
    "terminology_consistent",
    "narrative_matches_output",
    "all_outputs_discussed",
    "no_placeholder_text",
    "no_broken_references",
    "code_chunk_labels_meaningful",
    "chunk_options_appropriate",
    "no_code_in_prose"
  ),
  category = c(
    rep("Code Quality", 9),
    rep("Reproducibility", 8),
    rep("Communication", 11),
    rep("Writing", 19),
    rep("AI Polish", 14)
  ),
  color = c(
    rep("#2166AC", 9),
    rep("#4DAC26", 8),
    rep("#E08214", 11),
    rep("#8073AC", 19),
    rep("#D6604D", 14)
  )
)

# Derive explicit category order from the metadata (keeps it colocated)
category_order <- c(
  "Code Quality",
  "Reproducibility",
  "Communication",
  "Writing",
  "AI Polish"
)

# Downstream changes: use joins instead of named vectors
# In criterion_order computation, pivot_longer result -> left_join(criteria_meta, by = c("criterion"))
criterion_order <- results |>
  select(all_of(criteria_meta$criterion)) |>
  summarise(across(everything(), \(x) mean(as.numeric(x), na.rm = TRUE))) |>
  pivot_longer(everything(), names_to = "criterion", values_to = "pass_rate") |>
  left_join(criteria_meta, by = "criterion") |>
  mutate(
    category = factor(category, levels = category_order),
    criterion_label = criterion |>
      str_replace_all("_", " ") |>
      str_to_sentence()
  ) |>
  arrange(category, pass_rate) |>
  pull(criterion_label)

# In plot_data, join metadata rather than indexing into category_map
plot_data <- results |>
  mutate(submission = paste0("S", row_number())) |>
  select(submission, all_of(criteria_meta$criterion)) |>
  pivot_longer(-submission, names_to = "criterion", values_to = "value") |>
  left_join(criteria_meta, by = "criterion") |>
  mutate(
    category = factor(category, levels = category_order),
    criterion_label = factor(
      criterion |> str_replace_all("_", " ") |> str_to_sentence(),
      levels = criterion_order
    )
  )

# Step 3: colour vector for y-axis labels
# element_text(colour) is applied top-to-bottom; factor levels run bottom-to-top
# Build a lookup from clean label -> category, then apply in reversed level order
label_to_category <- criteria_meta |>
  mutate(
    criterion_label = criterion |>
      str_replace_all("_", " ") |>
      str_to_sentence()
  ) |>
  distinct(criterion_label, category)

label_colors <- tibble(criterion_label = rev(criterion_order)) |>
  left_join(
    criteria_meta |>
      mutate(
        criterion_label = criterion |>
          str_replace_all("_", " ") |>
          str_to_sentence()
      ),
    by = "criterion_label"
  ) |>
  pull(color)

ggplot(plot_data, aes(x = submission, y = criterion_label, fill = value)) +
  geom_tile(color = "white", linewidth = 0.4) +
  scale_fill_manual(
    values = c("TRUE" = "#FFFFFF", "FALSE" = "#F4A582"),
    na.value = "#F0F0F0"
  ) +
  labs(
    title = "Assignment code quality criteria — cohort overview",
    subtitle = "Criteria grouped by category, ordered by pass rate within group. Orange = criterion not met.",
    x = NULL,
    y = NULL,
    caption = "Based on LLM-assisted evaluation · n = 27 submissions"
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 10) +
  theme(
    plot.title = element_text(face = "bold", size = 12, margin = margin(b = 4)),
    plot.subtitle = element_text(
      size = 8,
      color = "grey50",
      margin = margin(b = 12)
    ),
    plot.caption = element_text(size = 7, color = "grey60", hjust = 0),
    axis.text.x = element_blank(),
    axis.text.y = element_text(size = 5.5, colour = label_colors),
    panel.grid = element_blank(),
    legend.position = "none",
    plot.margin = margin(t = 10, r = 10, b = 10, l = 10)
  )

```
